services.label: ACA API
services.description: Main REST API gateway -- scans, findings, auth, checkout, admin
services.notes: FastAPI service. Connects to Cosmos DB (scans, findings containers).

services.label: ACA Collector
services.description: Azure subscription data collector -- inventory, cost, Advisor, policy pulls
services.notes: MSAL device-code consent flow. Stores to Cosmos inventories + cost-data containers.

services.label: ACA Analysis Engine
services.description: 12-rule heuristic analysis engine -- cost anomalies, stale resources, SKU oversize
services.notes: Rules 01-12. Produces findings saved to Cosmos advisor + findings containers.

services.label: ACA Delivery
services.description: Report generator and packager -- generates Tier 1 deliverables for clients
services.notes: Reads from findings container. Outputs PDF/JSON report packages.

services.label: ACA Frontend
services.description: Vite + React 19 + Fluent UI v9 SPA. 10 screens. i18next (en, fr-CA, pt-BR, es, de). WCAG 2.1 AA.
services.notes: ConsentBanner -> GTM -> GA4 + Clarity. Stripe.js + Elements for checkout. a11y axe-core CI gate.
